tasks.subject: Verify E16 exit criteria — audit implementation vs spec
tasks.description: Audit all 5 exit criteria of E16 (AI Agents Expansion) by examining backend code, frontend UI, tests, fake providers, and LLM backend integration for US-107 (Content Repurposing), US-108 (Auto-Scheduling), US-109 (SEO Auto-Optimize).

tasks.subject: Fix main.py LLM backend switching for E16 agents
tasks.description: In main.py, replace hardcoded Fake*Service with LLM-powered services when AI_LAB_LLM_BACKEND is set and API key available. Fall back to Fake services otherwise. Must follow existing pattern from task_support.py _build_llm_service()

tasks.subject: Implement SEO per-section accept/reject with draft apply
tasks.description: Add accept/reject buttons per SEO change section, backend API to apply accepted changes to blog idea draft, and update the frontend to show interactive accept/reject UI instead of read-only diff display.

tasks.subject: Write rigorous tests for LLM switching and SEO apply
tasks.description: Write real, thorough tests (not just happy-path). Test: LLM service selection logic, fallback to Fake when no API key, SEO apply changes for each section type (title, meta, headings, links, keywords), edge cases (empty changes, invalid sections, draft already empty). Must catch real bugs.

tasks.subject: Build Scheduling suggestion UI with AI rationale + Celery auto-publish
tasks.description: Frontend: Update ScheduleButton to show AI suggestion (rationale, confidence, suggested date/time). Add "Get AI Suggestion" button that calls POST /admin/blog-posts/{id}/suggest-schedule. Backend: Add Celery periodic task for auto-publishing scheduled posts.

tasks.subject: Build Admin submitted-links review UI
tasks.description: Investigated submitted-links page — already functional (list + detail + reprocess + status badges). No additional work needed.

tasks.subject: Add "Share" dropdown on public blog post page
tasks.description: BlogShareButtons component already exists and is rendered on blog detail page. Includes X/Twitter, LinkedIn, and Copy link. No additional work needed.
tasks.activeForm: Building Share dropdown on public blog

tasks.subject: Write E2E tests for scheduling suggestion UI and SEO accept/reject flow
tasks.description: Playwright tests for: 1) scheduling suggestion button shows rationale/confidence, 2) accept suggestion sets scheduled_at, 3) SEO optimize-seo page accept/reject per section, 4) SEO apply changes updates draft.
tasks.activeForm: Writing E2E tests for Scheduling + SEO

tasks.subject: Richer Claim Review UI
tasks.description: Investigated claim review UI — already rich (filter tabs, search, evidence form, bulk waive, claim types, blocking banner). Deferred item from old backlog; current implementation is functional and well-integrated.

tasks.subject: Audit test coverage & write real-world tests for gap modules
tasks.description: Added 109 new backend tests: 30 pipeline_runner, 47 blog_series, 18 task_support, 14 blog_social. All pass. Plus 2 E2E tests for scheduling suggestion and SEO page.

tasks.subject: Launch polish: SEO metadata, error boundaries, loading states, pre-flight
tasks.description: SEO audit: fixed blog/series/[slug] to use createPublicMetadata (OG image, Twitter cards, canonical). Auth pages /contact /login /register are client components so can't use metadata — acceptable. Added metadata audit report.

tasks.subject: Advanced caching/CDN strategy
tasks.description: Caching audit: removed cache: no-store from all public data fetches (showcases, blog posts, tags, projects, ai-news, blog series). Backend already sets max-age=60 + s-maxage=300 + stale-while-revalidate=600. Redis cache layer exists. CDN config is missing — pending infra decision.

tasks.subject: Build Blog Series admin CRUD UI
tasks.description: Create a full admin UI for managing blog series: list all series, create new, edit series metadata (title, description, slug, cover), add/remove/reorder posts within a series. Backend API already exists at /admin/blog-series.
